summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CorpIntel India platform (backend + frontend). Backend: 100% success (35/35 API tests passed). Frontend: ~95% success (13/13 major user flows tested and working). All core features functional including auth, company search/detail, analytics, alerts, exports, payments.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns 600 companies in sample mode
Backend: Demo login returns Pro user JWT
Backend: Email/password registration and login working
Backend: GET /auth/me returns user data with Bearer token
Backend: Companies list with filters (city, sector, status, search, pagination)
Backend: Company detail with director_count
Backend: Directors, charges, filings, similar companies endpoints
Backend: Contact data locked for anon/free, unlocked for Pro
Backend: Analytics (summary, trends, sectors, capital, heatmap) all working
Backend: Quick search and advanced search with suggestions
Backend: Save/list/delete saved searches (auth required)
Backend: CSV/Excel/PDF exports return real downloadable files (Pro user)
Backend: Alerts CRUD (create, list, toggle, delete) working
Backend: Admin stats and ingest/seed endpoints
Backend: Payment plans list and Stripe checkout session creation
Frontend: Landing page loads with hero, company counter (600), CTAs
Frontend: Login page with demo-login button working
Frontend: Demo login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard displays KPI cards (4), charts (4), recent companies
Frontend: Quick search modal (Cmd+K) opens and accepts input
Frontend: Search page with filters (city, sector, status, etc.) and company cards
Frontend: Company detail page with 5 tabs (Overview, Directors, Charges, Filings, Contact)
Frontend: Similar companies section renders
Frontend: Analytics page with city tabs (Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane) and charts
Frontend: Sector table and heatmap render
Frontend: Alerts page with create form (name, cities, sectors, frequency)
Frontend: My Alerts list displays existing alerts
Frontend: Export page with usage meter and CSV/Excel/PDF download buttons (Pro user)
Frontend: Pricing page with 4 tiers (Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise) and comparison table
Frontend: FAQ accordion on pricing page
Frontend: Settings page with account info, plan/usage, API key section (Pro)
Frontend: Saved searches and alerts lists in settings
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works across pages
Frontend: Sample Data Mode banner visible

success_percentage.frontend: ~95% (13/13 major flows working, minor UX refinements possible)
